case_title: MARK SOLE VS. JEFFREY A. JELINEO

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,100.00 FILED BY SOLE, MARK AS TO DEFENDANT JELINEO, JEFFREY A. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-20-2021 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUL-26-2021, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT JELINEO, JEFFREY A.
REMARK: EXHIBITS RECD BY DROP BOX SUBMITTED BY DEFENDANT
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-20-2021 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO NOV-22-2021 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF MARK SOLE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JEFFREY A. JELINEO IS PRESENT VIA UNAUTHORZIED ZOOM APPEARANCE. CASE CONTINUED TO ALLOW DEFENDANT TO SUBMIT A TIMELY ZOOM APPEARANCE REQUEST. DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RECEIVED BY COURT BUT NOT RETAINED IN D506. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF SOLE, MARK AS TO DEFENDANT JELINEO, JEFFREY A.
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY DEFENDANT JELINEO, JEFFREY A.
ORDER RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM **GRANTED**

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE IMPROPER VENUE. PLAINTIFF MARK SOLE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JEFFREY A. JELINO IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: A. DATT. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
EXHIBITS DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE: ANNE-CHRISTINE MASSULLO ON NOVEMBER 8, 2024 PURSUANT TO SECTION 1952 OF THE CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE OF CALIFORNIA.
EXHIBIT DEFENDANT - RECEIVED {HEARING: SEPT-20-2021 AT 8:30AM} AS TO DEFENDANT JELINEO, JEFFREY A.
ORDER TO CONTINUE CASE PER DEFENDANT REQUEST.
DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY DEFENDANT JELINEO, JEFFREY A.
